code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    else if b == 45 and not has
      neg = true
    else
      if has
        if neg
          result = list.push(result, -cur)
        else
          result = list.push(result, cur)
        end
        cur = 0
        has = false
        neg = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      result = list.push(result, -cur)
    else
      result = list.push(result, cur)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn insert_unique(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(sorted, x)
    return sorted
  end
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = sorted.len()
  while i < n
    let v = match sorted.get(i)
      when Some(u)
        u
      when None
        0
      end
    if not inserted and x < v
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
for x in a
  sorted = insert_unique(sorted, x)
end
for y in b
  sorted = insert_unique(sorted, y)
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for z in sorted
  if first
    out = "#{z}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{z}"
  end
end
println(out)
